Object# InvalidProratedPriceForChangeItemWithEffectiveLaterError

Advanced Commerce API 1.2+

```
object InvalidProratedPriceForChangeItemWithEffectiveLaterError
```

## [Properties](/documentation/AdvancedCommerceAPI/InvalidProratedPriceForChangeItemWithEffectiveLaterError#properties)

`errorCode``number`

 Value: `4000222``errorMessage``string`

 Value: `Invalid request. A prorated price shouldn't be present to change items with the change taking effect later.`## [ Mentioned in ](/documentation/AdvancedCommerceAPI/InvalidProratedPriceForChangeItemWithEffectiveLaterError#mentions)
